description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage unit with a flat top surface, suitable for use as a coffee table or low shelf. The front features two open horizontal shelves and a set of four vertical cubby compartments, ideal for organizing books, magazines, or small items. The sides are adorned with decorative X-brace patterns, adding a touch of rustic or farmhouse style. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, giving the piece a natural and warm appearance. The structure is supported by four sturdy legs, slightly inset from the corners for stability. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, and the open design allows easy access to all compartments.
description: A rectangular wooden storage table with open shelves and vertical cubbies, featuring decorative X-brace sides and a natural wood finish.
description_view_0: The front view shows two open shelves and four vertical cubby compartments on the left side, with the right side open for larger items.
description_view_1: The right side view highlights the decorative X-brace pattern and the solid wood paneling, with no visible shelves or cubbies.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the open shelves and cubbies, with the same wood grain finish and no additional features.
description_view_3: The left side view mirrors the right, showing the X-brace design and solid wood construction.
